---
title: "Tim"
pagetitle: "Istraživački tim / Research team — DigiKat"
subtitle: "Članovi projekta na Hrvatskome katoličkom sveučilištu"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.column-screen}
<section class="dk-section dk-section--top">
<div class="dk-container">
<div class="dk-eyebrow">07 — Tim / Team</div>
<h2 style="font-family:'Source Serif 4',serif; font-weight:600; font-size:32px; line-height:1.12; margin:8px 0 8px; color:#14181d;">Istraživački tim</h2>
<p class="dk-lead" style="margin-bottom:14px;">Research team — roles in both languages, with affiliation at the Croatian Catholic University.</p>
<p class="dk-mono" style="font-size:12px; color:#b08a52; margin:0 0 36px;">// placeholder entries — replace names &amp; photos with real members</p>

<div class="dk-grid dk-grid--3">
<div class="dk-person"><div class="dk-person__avatar">IP</div><div><div style="font-weight:600; font-size:16px; color:#14181d;">Ime Prezime</div><div style="font-size:13px; color:#4f535a; margin-top:1px;">Voditelj projekta</div><div style="font-size:12.5px; color:#8a8e95;">Principal Investigator</div></div></div>
<div class="dk-person"><div class="dk-person__avatar">IP</div><div><div style="font-weight:600; font-size:16px; color:#14181d;">Ime Prezime</div><div style="font-size:13px; color:#4f535a; margin-top:1px;">Suvoditelj — računalne metode</div><div style="font-size:12.5px; color:#8a8e95;">Co-I, Computational Methods</div></div></div>
<div class="dk-person"><div class="dk-person__avatar">IP</div><div><div style="font-weight:600; font-size:16px; color:#14181d;">Ime Prezime</div><div style="font-size:13px; color:#4f535a; margin-top:1px;">Viša istraživačica</div><div style="font-size:12.5px; color:#8a8e95;">Senior Researcher</div></div></div>
<div class="dk-person"><div class="dk-person__avatar">IP</div><div><div style="font-weight:600; font-size:16px; color:#14181d;">Ime Prezime</div><div style="font-size:13px; color:#4f535a; margin-top:1px;">Istraživač — NLP</div><div style="font-size:12.5px; color:#8a8e95;">Researcher, NLP</div></div></div>
<div class="dk-person"><div class="dk-person__avatar">IP</div><div><div style="font-weight:600; font-size:16px; color:#14181d;">Ime Prezime</div><div style="font-size:13px; color:#4f535a; margin-top:1px;">Doktorand</div><div style="font-size:12.5px; color:#8a8e95;">Doctoral Researcher</div></div></div>
<div class="dk-person"><div class="dk-person__avatar">IP</div><div><div style="font-weight:600; font-size:16px; color:#14181d;">Ime Prezime</div><div style="font-size:13px; color:#4f535a; margin-top:1px;">Znanstveni asistent — podaci</div><div style="font-size:12.5px; color:#8a8e95;">Research Assistant, Data</div></div></div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
:::
